findings.title: iOS 26 gate not enforced in AIOrchestrator — Foundation Model called unconditionally
findings.description: FoundationModelService.isAvailable is never checked before calling adapt(). The @available annotation prevents compilation on older OS but if DI injects the service without the guard, raw private health data flows into an undefined path.
findings.evidence: AIOrchestrator.process() contains no #available(iOS 26, *) guard at any call site
findings.recommended_fix: Add guard foundationModel.isAvailable else { ... } before every adapt() call, or wrap in #available(iOS 26, *)

findings.title: Misleading docstring — claims confidence 0 escalates to cloud, but Foundation Model is Tier 3 (post-cloud)
findings.description: FallbackFoundationModel.adapt() returns confidence 0.0 with comment saying orchestrator will escalate to cloud. But Foundation Model is Tier 3 — cloud was already called at Tier 2. The 0-confidence result keeps the unpersonalised baseRecommendation.
findings.evidence: Protocol docstring and FallbackFoundationModel comment both incorrect
findings.recommended_fix: Correct both to say confidence 0 → orchestrator keeps unpersonalised baseRecommendation

findings.title: Header says 'encrypted store' but uses plain UserDefaults — security misrepresentation
findings.description: Class header reads 'On-device encrypted store of recommendation outcomes.' Actual persistence is UserDefaults.standard — no encryption beyond standard iOS file protection. Stored signals are health-adjacent inferences.
findings.recommended_fix: Use Keychain-backed store or NSFileProtection.completeUnlessOpen, or remove 'encrypted' from header

findings.title: genderIdentity hardcoded to prefer_not_to_say — profile value discarded
findings.description: snapshot.genderIdentity is unconditionally set to 'prefer_not_to_say'. Users who provided gender during onboarding are silently excluded from gender-segmented cohorts.
findings.recommended_fix: Read profile.genderIdentity and map to valid values, fallback to prefer_not_to_say only when nil

findings.title: trainingDaysPerWeek is compile-time constant, not user's actual schedule
findings.description: DayType.allCases.filter(\.isTrainingDay).count counts enum cases, not the user's weekly plan. User training 2 days gets same value as one training 5 days.
findings.recommended_fix: Source from user's actual program schedule or UserPreferences.trainingDaysPerWeek

findings.title: dietPattern hardcoded to 'standard' — user diet preference never used
findings.description: Every user's nutrition bands include diet_pattern: standard regardless of actual diet. Vegetarian, vegan, keto users misclassified.
findings.recommended_fix: Map from UserPreferences diet field, standard as nil fallback only

findings.title: stressLevel() fabricates 'moderate' when no log exists — suppresses insufficientData path
findings.description: Non-optional return type means nil log returns 'moderate', causing recovery segment to always have a stressLevel. Suppresses insufficientData path and sends fabricated band to cloud.
findings.evidence: Returns "moderate" when no recent log exists
findings.recommended_fix: Return String? and nil when no log present. Propagate nil through contribute()

findings.title: BMI fallback uses startWeightKg — produces stale band for users who gained/lost weight
findings.description: When live weight and recent log weight are nil, adapter uses onboarding start weight. For users with significant weight change, BMI band is wrong.
findings.recommended_fix: Return nil when only startWeightKg available, trigger local fallback path

findings.title: BMI has no plausibility bounds — heights of 1cm or weights of 1kg produce wildly wrong values
findings.description: Only guard is heightCm > 0. Heights of 1cm or weights of 1kg pass and produce incorrect BMI, all falling in 30+ band.
findings.recommended_fix: Add bounds: heightCm 100-250, weightKg 30-300

findings.title: mealsPerDay falls back to total meal count including planned-but-uneaten meals
findings.description: When no completed meals exist, mealsPerDay uses latestNutrition?.meals.count which includes planned uneaten meals. User with 5 planned but 0 eaten gets banded as 5+.
findings.recommended_fix: Return nil when completed count is zero, propagate nil to trigger local fallback

findings.title: lastAdapters empty on first process() — freshness penalized unfairly on first launch
findings.description: lastAdapters initialized as []. First process() call before setAdapters() returns freshness 0, degrading first-launch recommendations to lower confidence tier.
findings.recommended_fix: Build adapters inside process() from snapshot, or make setAdapters() a precondition

findings.title: processAll() causes isProcessing to flicker true→false between segments — 4 loading states
findings.description: Each process() owns its own isProcessing lifecycle via defer. processAll() toggles flag 4 times. SwiftUI observers see 4 loading states.
findings.recommended_fix: Lift isProcessing lifecycle to processAll(), suppress in individual process() calls

findings.title: JWT validation only checks structural format — expired JWTs cause avoidable network calls
findings.description: looksLikeJWT accepts any x.y.z string. Expired JWTs pass, hit cloud, return 401.
findings.recommended_fix: Add lightweight local expiry check on exp claim

findings.title: localFallback GoalMode uses 'Fat Loss' string — mismatches 'weight_loss' from ProfileAdapter
findings.description: NutritionGoalMode(rawValue: snapshot.primaryGoal ?? "Fat Loss") won't match weight_loss format. Both parse paths likely always fail, defaulting silently.
findings.recommended_fix: Align string formats between ProfileAdapter and AITypes

findings.title: trainingDaysWeekBand() has no case for 0 — rest weeks banded as 5+
findings.description: Switch handles 1...2, 3...4, default 5+. A user with 0 training days (deload week) classified as high-frequency.
findings.recommended_fix: Add case 0: return "0" or "rest_week"

findings.title: enforceLimit() O(n × segments) under lock on every record() call
findings.description: Four filter passes over entire outcomes array run synchronously under NSLock on every record(). OK at ~800 but doesn't scale.
findings.evidence: Four full filter passes in enforceLimit()
findings.recommended_fix: Use dictionary keyed by segment, O(1) eviction

findings.title: avgSessionMinutes uses fixed 10min/exercise — systematically underestimates duration
findings.description: max(20, log.exerciseLogs.count * 10) ignores sets, rest, logged duration. 6-exercise session estimated at 60min but actual is 75-90min.
findings.recommended_fix: Use logged session duration when available, or a more accurate heuristic

findings.title: Placeholder returns hardcoded confidence 0.8 — always passes confidence gate
findings.description: Until iOS 26 SDK ships, applyLocalAdjustments returns 0.8 confidence. Since 0.8 >= 0.4 threshold, every iOS 26+ user gets placeholder with artificially high confidence.
findings.recommended_fix: Add #warning and use lower placeholder confidence like 0.5

findings.title: AnyCodable silently substitutes empty string for unrecognized JSON types
findings.description: When no known type matches, value = "" is assigned silently. Consumers get unexpected empty strings.
findings.recommended_fix: Throw DecodingError.dataCorruptedError to surface malformed payloads

findings.title: build() discards adapters — callers must rebuild to call setAdapters()
findings.description: Builder constructs adapters internally but returns only snapshot. Callers who need orchestrator.lastAdapters must duplicate construction. Root cause of AI-011.
findings.recommended_fix: Return (snapshot, adapters) tuple from build()

findings.title: Debug auto-login in all Simulator builds — hardcoded session token persisted to Keychain
findings.description: applyReviewSessionIfNeeded() auto-authenticates every DEBUG+Simulator run with hardcoded sessionToken: 'simulator-debug-token' persisted to Keychain. No explicit opt-in required. Risk: fake session used against staging/production Supabase endpoints.
findings.recommended_fix: Gate behind explicit developer flag, not just #if DEBUG + Simulator check

findings.title: Review-mode hardcoded token persisted to Keychain without #if DEBUG guard
findings.description: sessionToken: 'review-session-token' saved to Keychain. applyReviewSessionIfNeeded() has no #if DEBUG guard. A production build with FITTRACKER_REVIEW_AUTH set would persist this token.
findings.recommended_fix: Wrap in #if DEBUG or use a build-configuration-specific flag

findings.title: signOut() swallows Supabase error silently — server-side JWT remains valid
findings.description: try? await supabase.auth.signOut(scope: .local) — failure is discarded, server-side JWT remains valid. Uses .local scope only.
findings.recommended_fix: Handle signOut error, consider using .global scope for complete logout

findings.title: hasRegisteredPasskey in unnamespaced UserDefaults — survives sign-out, shared across users
findings.description: Key ft.passkeyRegistered survives sign-out and is shared across users on the same device. New user inherits previous user's passkey state.
findings.evidence: UserDefaults key not namespaced by userID
findings.recommended_fix: Namespace by userID or clear on sign-out

findings.title: restoreSession() timeout race has logic gap — continuation never resumed on timeout
findings.description: The timeout task cancels work but never calls continuation.resume(). Timeout task also not cancelled when work returns nil.
findings.recommended_fix: Resume continuation with nil or error in timeout path, cancel timeout on normal completion

findings.title: Passkey assertion not verified server-side — acts as local-only auth
findings.description: WebAuthn signature used as sessionToken raw Base64, never sent to backend for cryptographic verification. backendAccessToken is nil for passkey sessions. Passkey is local-only with no backend trust anchor.
findings.evidence: No server-side verification of WebAuthn assertion
findings.recommended_fix: Send assertion to backend for verification, obtain proper backend token

findings.title: pushPendingChanges() silently drops all individual push errors
findings.description: Empty catch { anyFailed = true } — no logging, no identification of which records failed, no retry scheduling.
findings.recommended_fix: Log errors, identify failed records, schedule retry

findings.title: try? on session retrieval treats auth expiry as silent no-op
findings.description: fetchChanges(), fetchAllRecords(), pushPendingChanges(), uploadCardioImage() all use try? for supabase.auth.session. Token refresh failure is invisible.
findings.evidence: try? on auth.session in multiple methods
findings.recommended_fix: Handle auth session errors explicitly, trigger re-auth flow

findings.title: lastPull timestamp not namespaced by userID — shared across users
findings.description: supabase.lastPull in UserDefaults is shared across users. Could cause data sync issues on user switch.
findings.recommended_fix: Namespace by userID

findings.title: Decryption errors during pull silently skipped, lastPull advances
findings.description: Per-row empty catch block. lastPull timestamp advances even when rows failed — failed records never retried.
findings.evidence: Empty catch in row processing loop
findings.recommended_fix: Track failed rows, don't advance lastPull past failures, schedule retry

findings.title: Realtime subscription can spawn concurrent fetchChanges() tasks
findings.description: Bulk server events (30 INSERTs) spawn 30 Tasks. guard case .idle stops most but no debouncing.
findings.recommended_fix: Add debounce (e.g., 500ms) to batch realtime events

findings.title: Singleton sync digests not namespaced by userID — shared across users
findings.description: supabase.user_profile, supabase.user_preferences, supabase.meal_templates shared across users.
findings.recommended_fix: Namespace all UserDefaults keys by userID

findings.title: HMAC timestamp in encrypted envelope never validated for staleness
findings.description: Timestamp is in signed data but never checked for staleness or validity during decryption. Uses .bitPattern (non-standard serialization).
findings.recommended_fix: Validate timestamp within acceptable range during decryption

findings.title: rotateKeys() not atomic — crash mid-rotation can corrupt data
findings.description: Keys saved to Keychain after blobs re-encrypted. Crash after encryption but before key persistence = new blobs undecryptable. Crash after first key but before all three = partial key state.
findings.recommended_fix: Use transaction-like approach: save new keys first, then re-encrypt, then delete old keys

findings.title: .biometryCurrentSet invalidates all encrypted data on biometric enrollment change
findings.description: Adding a new face/finger permanently revokes access to all encrypted health data with no recovery path. Data loss risk.
findings.recommended_fix: Use .biometryAny or implement key recovery mechanism

findings.title: persistToDisk() errors silently set lastError only — callers are fire-and-forget
findings.description: All callers use Task { await persistToDisk() }. Disk-full or encryption errors cause data to be in-memory only, lost on next launch.
findings.recommended_fix: Add completion handler or retry mechanism for persistence failures

findings.title: CloudKit directly mutates dataStore.dailyLogs bypassing mutation API
findings.description: Direct dataStore.dailyLogs[idx].needsSync = false bypasses markSynced() and does not trigger persistToDisk(). Sync state lost on crash.
findings.recommended_fix: Use markSynced() API to ensure persistence is triggered

findings.title: CloudKit daily log merge doesn't check needsSync before remote-wins
findings.description: Unlike mergeWeeklySnapshot(), daily log merge replaces local data based on timestamp alone, ignoring unsaved local edits (needsSync = true).
findings.evidence: Missing needsSync check in daily log merge
findings.recommended_fix: Check needsSync before overwriting with remote data

findings.title: deleteAllUserRecords() deletes CloudKit records one-by-one — partial deletion risk
findings.description: Sequential individual deletes for 365+ records. Any failure leaves partial deletion. Should use CKModifyRecordsOperation with batches of 400.
findings.recommended_fix: Use CKModifyRecordsOperation with batch size 400

findings.title: KeychainHelper.save() discards SecItemAdd return status
findings.description: SecItemAdd result not checked. Silent Keychain save failure causes session to be in-memory only, lost on next launch.
findings.recommended_fix: Check SecItemAdd status, handle failures

findings.title: Full UserSession JSON with live JWT stored as single unprotected Keychain item
findings.description: backendAccessToken (live Supabase JWT), email, phone all in one item with only WhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly. Should separate JWT into tighter ACL.
findings.evidence: Single Keychain item with all credentials
findings.recommended_fix: Separate JWT into its own Keychain item with tighter access control

findings.title: Continuation leaked on concurrent startSignIn() calls — first caller hangs
findings.description: Second call to startSignIn() overwrites self.continuation, leaking the first (Swift Concurrency warning, first caller hangs indefinitely).
findings.recommended_fix: Resume previous continuation with cancellation error before overwriting

findings.title: Account deletion grace period stored only in UserDefaults, never synced to Supabase
findings.description: Comment says 'will be synced' but no Supabase call exists. Reinstall during grace period silently cancels deletion.
findings.evidence: Missing Supabase sync for deletion state
findings.recommended_fix: Sync deletion request to Supabase, check on app launch

findings.title: executeDeletion() deletes data rows but not Supabase Auth user record — incomplete GDPR
findings.description: After account deletion, the Supabase Auth user (email address) persists. Incomplete GDPR deletion.
findings.recommended_fix: Delete Supabase Auth user record as part of account deletion

findings.title: Hardcoded verification code '48291' in local email auth provider
findings.description: LocalEmailAuthProvider uses hardcoded verification code for development.
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure this never ships to production, add #if DEBUG guard

findings.title: pushSingletons() checksum skip doesn't verify server has the record
findings.description: Checksum match skips push but doesn't verify server actually has the record.
findings.recommended_fix: Add server-side existence check or track push confirmation

findings.title: deleteStoredKeys() followed by encrypt() silently generates new keys
findings.description: No error when encrypting after key deletion — generates fresh keys silently, old data unrecoverable.
findings.recommended_fix: Make encrypt() fail if keys were explicitly deleted

findings.title: Comment references non-existent MockEmailAuthProvider
findings.description: Code comment references a mock that doesn't exist in the codebase.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove stale comment

findings.title: sleepGoalHours hardcoded as 8.0 with TODO comment
findings.description: TODO to make configurable, currently hardcoded for all users.
findings.recommended_fix: Make configurable per user preferences

findings.title: generateNonce() and sha256() are dead code
findings.description: Utility functions exist but are never called from any code path.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove dead code

findings.title: 12 hardcoded .font(.system(size:)) calls — responsive sizing bypasses AppText
findings.description: MainScreenView has 12 inline system(size:) calls with ternary expressions for size-class responsiveness. Comments acknowledge the gap. Labels don't grow with Accessibility Larger Text.
findings.recommended_fix: Add AppText scale variants using @ScaledMetric anchor, replace all 12 calls

findings.title: Deprecated Color.status.* and Color.accent.* aliases still used — 66 call-sites across 8 files
findings.description: AppTheme deprecated lowercase Color extensions. 66 call-sites continue using them. Worst: TrainingPlanView (35), NutritionView (11).
findings.recommended_fix: Global rename to AppColor.Status.* and AppColor.Accent.*, delete deprecated extension block

findings.title: Deprecated Color.appOrange*/appBlue*/appSurface/appStroke — 26 call-sites across 4 files
findings.description: MainScreenView caches deprecated aliases. StatsView uses them in chart helpers. AuthHubView uses appBlue2/appSurface/appStroke.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with AppColor.*: appOrange1→Brand.warmSoft, appBlue2→Brand.secondary, etc. Delete deprecated block.

findings.title: Token pipeline covers ~60% of AppTheme — chart, motion, opacity, size, layout tokens absent
findings.description: 10 chart colours, all AppMotion/AppSpring/AppEasing, AppOpacity, AppSize, AppLayout missing from tokens.json. Invisible to CI and Figma sync.
findings.evidence: No chart, motion, opacity, size, or layout sections in tokens.json
findings.recommended_fix: Add missing sections to tokens.json, extend Style Dictionary transform

findings.title: Hardcoded 32pt hero title — should use AppText.hero
findings.description: First screen every user sees has hardcoded font that doesn't adapt to Accessibility text sizes.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with .font(AppText.hero)

findings.title: 9 hardcoded icon/symbol sizes across 7 files — AppText.icon* tokens available but unused
findings.description: Values 28, 32, 36, 40, 56 used as raw .font(.system(size:)) for SF Symbols. AppText defines iconSmall through iconDisplay.
findings.recommended_fix: Map to AppText.icon* tokens: 28=iconMedium, 32=iconXL, etc.

findings.title: 10 ad-hoc .animation() literals bypass AppMotion/AppSpring/AppEasing tokens
findings.description: AppMotion defines spring and easing tokens. 10 animation calls use inline literals. Even AppDesignSystemComponents has 2 inline literals.
findings.recommended_fix: Map to AppSpring/AppEasing tokens: 0.35s→snappy, 0.5s→smooth, 0.6s→progress

findings.title: Two inline GeometryReader progress bars bypass ProgressBar component
findings.description: ProgressBar in DesignSystem has token colours, reduce-motion, AppSpring.progress animation. NutritionView duplicates pattern inline twice without reduce-motion.
findings.evidence: Inline GeometryReader + ZStack progress bar pattern
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with ProgressBar component

findings.title: No dark-mode adaptive colour variants — all tokens light-mode only
findings.description: All Surface tokens are white-based (rgba 255,255,255). No dark-mode variants in asset catalog. @Environment colorScheme referenced in only 7 files. App supports colorScheme preference but tokens don't adapt.
findings.recommended_fix: Define dark variants in asset catalog for Text, Surface, Background, Border token families

findings.title: Chart (10), Selection (2), and appWarmTint tokens missing from pipeline — invisible to CI
findings.description: Three token groups in AppTheme have no tokens.json entries. Invisible to make tokens-check and Figma sync.
findings.recommended_fix: Add to tokens.json and Style Dictionary transform

findings.title: Inline opacity literals bypass AppOpacity tokens — disabled/subtle/hover under-utilized
findings.description: AppOpacity defines disabled(0.15), subtle(0.12), hover(0.08). Multiple .opacity(0.12) and .opacity(0.15) use magic numbers. AppOpacity.hover has zero usages.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace 0.12→subtle, 0.15→disabled, 0.08→hover. Document remaining non-token values.

findings.title: AppText.metricM uses private Font.custom('SF Pro Rounded') — brittle across OS versions
findings.description: All other AppText uses public Font.system(design: .rounded). This one uses private font name.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with @ScaledMetric + Font.system(size:weight:.bold, design:.rounded)

findings.title: Raw Color.black.opacity(0.4) scrim — no AppColor.Overlay.scrim token exists
findings.description: Modal backdrop uses raw literal. No semantic token for overlay scrim.
findings.recommended_fix: Add AppColor.Overlay.scrim token

findings.title: Hardcoded 56pt padding — AppSize.tabBarClearance token exists but unused
findings.description: Token exists exactly for this use case but call-site uses literal.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace 56 with AppSize.tabBarClearance

findings.title: AppColor.Focus.ring and AppOpacity.hover defined but never referenced in any view
findings.description: Two tokens with zero usages. Maintenance liability.
findings.evidence: grep returns 0 view results for both
findings.recommended_fix: Wire to interactive elements or document/remove

findings.title: Version mismatch: audit-findings.json says framework_version 6.1, all other configs say 6.0
findings.description: audit-findings.json claims framework_version 6.1 while dispatch-intelligence.json, cache-metrics.json, and token-budget.json all say 6.0. Inconsistency in the version story.
findings.recommended_fix: Align all configs to same version. If 6.1 is the HADF extension, update all configs.

findings.title: framework-manifest.json description still says 'PM framework v5.2'
findings.description: Description field references v5.2 despite framework_version being 6.0.
findings.recommended_fix: Update description to match current version

findings.title: structure.shared_files = 15; actual count is 25
findings.description: The manifest claims 15 shared files but there are now 25 JSON files in .claude/shared/.
findings.recommended_fix: Update the manifest count or auto-compute it

findings.title: model field says claude-opus-4-6 but subagents may run on sonnet
findings.description: token-budget.json records model as claude-opus-4-6 but the tokenizer and actual running model may differ. Misleading attribution.
findings.recommended_fix: Record actual model used or remove model field from token-budget

findings.title: Zero measurements across all fields — no features have ever been measured
findings.description: Despite 8+ completed case studies and multiple framework versions, cache-metrics.json has all zeros. The SKILL.md protocol to update on feature completion has never fired.
findings.recommended_fix: Either run a backfill from existing case study data, or fix the measurement trigger in SKILL.md

findings.title: No framework_version root field — deviates from standard config pattern
findings.description: Most .claude/shared/ configs have a framework_version field. cache-metrics.json does not.
findings.recommended_fix: Add framework_version field

findings.title: chip-profiles.json: 17 profiles — PASS, matches spec
findings.description: HADF Layer 1 validation: correct count.
findings.recommended_fix: None

findings.title: hardware-signature-table.json: 7 signatures — PASS, matches spec
findings.description: HADF Layer 2 validation: correct count.
findings.recommended_fix: None

findings.title: HADF hardware_context: enabled=false, thresholds 0.4/0.7 — PASS
findings.description: HADF integration validation: config matches spec.
findings.recommended_fix: None

findings.title: All skill routing entries verified against actual SKILL.md files — PASS
findings.description: Every entry in skill-routing.json maps to a real SKILL.md file.
findings.recommended_fix: None

findings.title: All cache _index.json files have empty entries[] — cache discovery protocol is broken
findings.description: Skills cannot find cache entries via task_signature lookup because all index files are empty. Cache hits only work when skills hardcode specific file names.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix cache indexing to populate _index.json on write, or switch to directory-scan discovery

findings.title: pm-workflow and dev L1 caches have zero content despite being highest-frequency skills
findings.description: The two most-used skills have empty caches while lower-frequency skills (ux, analytics, qa) have real content.
findings.evidence: Empty L1 for pm-workflow and dev
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate why cache writes are not occurring for these skills

findings.title: No stale cache detected in sampled entries — referenced files exist
findings.description: 5 sampled cache entries all reference files and functions that still exist.
findings.recommended_fix: None

findings.title: No Phase 0 health checks have ever run — history empty, last_check null
findings.description: framework-health.json has history: [], last_check: null. The 25% probability trigger has never fired.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate probability trigger or run manual health check

findings.title: framework_self_audit section is all null — scaffold never written to
findings.description: The self-audit fields were scaffolded but never populated by any process.
findings.recommended_fix: This audit will populate it — not a bug, just initial state

findings.title: Two in_progress case studies stuck at framework_version 4.3 — 4 major versions behind
findings.description: dispatch-intelligence-v5.2 and parallel-write-safety-v5.2 show as in_progress at v4.3 despite being completed features.
findings.recommended_fix: Update statuses to complete, update framework versions

findings.title: v52-dispatch-log.json not referenced by any SKILL.md or config — dead artifact
findings.description: Orphaned file from v5.2 development, not linked from any active config.
findings.recommended_fix: Archive or delete

findings.title: Chip Affinity Map empty by design — HADF Layer 4 not yet active
findings.description: Expected initial state. Will populate when HADF is enabled.
findings.recommended_fix: None — expected

findings.title: Case study claims 80% prediction accuracy; raw log records 75% — denominator ambiguity
findings.description: The case study narrative reports 80% dispatch prediction accuracy; the raw log computes 75%. Discrepancy is likely a denominator choice (excluding PENDING dispatch).
findings.recommended_fix: Document denominator explicitly in case study

findings.title: Inverted timestamps: dispatch-intelligence started_at later than updated_at
findings.description: dispatch-intelligence-v5.2 has started_at (10:00) later than updated_at (06:30). Logically impossible.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix timestamps or regenerate from git log

findings.title: EncryptionService has zero tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
findings.description: No test exercises EncryptionService directly. Tests in FitTrackerCoreTests.swift indirectly rely on EncryptedDataStore but never test: key derivation, AES-GCM correctness, IV uniqueness, wrong-key decryption failure, key rotation, or keychain fallback.
findings.evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'EncryptionService' → zero results
findings.recommended_fix: Add EncryptionServiceTests.swift covering: round-trip encrypt/decrypt, wrong-key rejection, IV uniqueness, empty-data edge, corrupted-ciphertext handling, keychain key regeneration

findings.title: AuthManager has zero direct tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
findings.description: No test directly instantiates AuthManager. State machine (unauthenticated → authenticating → authenticated → locked) untested. State transitions from app lifecycle events completely absent.
findings.evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'AuthManager' → zero results
findings.recommended_fix: Add AuthManagerTests.swift covering: initial state, authentication transition, lock/unlock cycle, session expiry, concurrent sign-in protection

findings.title: CloudKitSyncService has zero tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
findings.description: No tests for sync conflict resolution, zone creation, push/fetch operations, network-offline fallback, or error recovery.
findings.evidence: No file in FitTrackerTests/ imports or tests CloudKitSyncService behaviour
findings.recommended_fix: Add CloudKitSyncServiceTests.swift with mock CKDatabase. Cover: zone setup, record serialisation, conflict resolution, offline queue

findings.title: SupabaseSyncService sync logic untested beyond disabled-state check
findings.description: Only test checks .disabled status when credentials absent. Actual sync logic (fetchChanges, pushChanges, token refresh, retry, pagination, merge) has zero coverage.
findings.recommended_fix: Add SupabaseSyncServiceTests.swift with mock URLSession. Cover: successful pull, 401 retry, network timeout, empty-delta, merge dispatch

findings.title: HealthKitService has zero tests — primary input to ReadinessEngine
findings.description: HealthKitService handles HRV, resting HR, sleep, step count. No tests for: permission flow, HKQuery construction, data mapping, unavailable fallback, stale data handling.
findings.evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'HealthKitService' → zero results
findings.recommended_fix: Add HealthKitServiceTests.swift with mock HKHealthStore. Cover: permission grant/deny, HRV mapping, nil-data degradation

findings.title: SignInService token expiry and refresh path untested
findings.description: 11 tests cover happy-path and config-gate paths. Missing: JWT expiry detection, token refresh flow, network-failure during sign-in, rate-limit handling, OTP verification failure.
findings.evidence: All 11 tests exercise happy-path or config-gate. No expiry/refresh test.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests for: expired JWT, token refresh success/failure, OTP wrong-code, rate-limit surfacing

findings.title: AIOrchestrator cloud-tier and adaptation paths untested
findings.description: Single test exercises local-fallback only with empty snapshot. Missing: cloud-tier path, FoundationModel adaptation, concurrent segment processing, error handling.
findings.evidence: FitTrackerCoreTests.swift:344-362 — single test, local fallback only
findings.recommended_fix: Add AIOrchestratorTests.swift: cloud call with complete bands, adaptation above/below 0.4 threshold, error recovery

findings.title: All 5 AI adapters have zero tests
findings.description: HealthKitAdapter, NutritionAdapter, ProfileAdapter, TrainingAdapter, AIInputAdapter — none have direct tests. Mapping logic untested.
findings.evidence: grep across FitTrackerTests for any adapter name → zero results
findings.recommended_fix: Add AIAdaptersTests.swift with golden I/O per adapter. Focus on edge cases: zero meals, nil biometrics, no training logs

findings.title: RecommendationMemory has zero tests
findings.description: Caching/deduplication for AI recommendations. No tests for store/retrieve, TTL expiry, segment isolation, or eviction.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests: store/retrieve round-trip, TTL expiry, segment isolation, clear()

findings.title: ValidatedRecommendation validation logic untested
findings.description: Wraps AIRecommendation with confidence thresholds, signal non-emptiness, segment consistency. Zero tests.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests: valid passes, below-threshold fails, empty signals fails, segment mismatch fails

findings.title: AccountDeletionService missing executeDeletion success path test
findings.description: 3 tests cover request/cancel/grace-period. Missing: full deletion success, partial backend failure, post-deletion sign-out.
findings.evidence: testExecuteDeletion only exercises simulator path asserting 'still pending' error
findings.recommended_fix: Add mock-based tests for full deletion, partial failure, grace period enforcement

findings.title: WatchConnectivityService has zero tests
findings.description: Watch/Phone data transfer with no tests for activation, messaging, applicationContext, or offline queue.
findings.recommended_fix: Add WatchConnectivityServiceTests.swift with mock WCSession

findings.title: NotificationService scheduling and delivery logic untested
findings.description: NotificationTests covers content builder and preferences. Missing: scheduleNotification(), permission flow, daily cap, duplicate prevention, quiet-hour suppression.
findings.evidence: Tests never call NotificationService methods directly
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests with mock UNUserNotificationCenter for scheduling, caps, quiet hours

findings.title: ReminderScheduler and ReminderTriggers untested
findings.description: ReminderTests covers ReminderType enum only. Missing: schedule(), lifetime cap enforcement, canSchedule(), trigger condition evaluation.
findings.evidence: zero references to ReminderScheduler or ReminderTriggers in tests
findings.recommended_fix: Add ReminderSchedulerTests.swift for lifetime limits, scheduling logic, trigger evaluation

findings.title: AppSettings has zero tests
findings.description: User-facing configuration. No tests for defaults, persistence, or migration.
findings.recommended_fix: Add basic tests: defaults match spec, UserDefaults round-trip, migration

findings.title: TrainingProgramStore only has weekday mapping tested
findings.description: Single test with 7 assertions for dayType(forWeekday:). Missing: phase transitions, currentProgram, exercise lists, set template defaults.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests for phase advancement, exercise list, set templates

findings.title: GoalProfile has zero tests
findings.description: Encapsulates goal context for AIOrchestrator weighting. No tests for construction, mapping, or defaults.
findings.recommended_fix: Add tests: GoalProfile from each NutritionGoalMode, default when nil

findings.title: WCAG token test asserts literal constant, not live token value
findings.description: testTextTertiaryOpacityMeetsWCAGAA() creates local tertiaryOpacity = 0.55 and asserts >= 0.55. Never reads AppColor.Text.tertiary. Passes even if production token regresses.
findings.evidence: Local variable, no reference to AppColor or AppTheme
findings.recommended_fix: Expose opacity as testable constant and assert against it

findings.title: Spacing scale test hardcodes 8 values — won't catch new non-conforming tokens
findings.description: Tests 8 hardcoded AppSpacing values. If new non-4pt-grid token added, test won't catch it.
findings.evidence: Hardcoded array, no iteration over all tokens
findings.recommended_fix: Expose AppSpacing.allValues and iterate, or CI gate on tokens.json

findings.title: Confidence gate boundary test asserts local arithmetic, not production code
findings.description: testEval_confidenceGateBoundary() defines threshold=0.4 locally. Does not call AIOrchestrator. Production threshold change undetected.
findings.evidence: All assertions use local variables, no production code reference
findings.recommended_fix: Write black-box test: AIOrchestrator with confidence 0.39 (no adaptation) and 0.41 (adaptation applied)

findings.title: Quiet-hours test asserts local arithmetic, never calls NotificationService
findings.description: Defines quiet-hour rule inline and asserts. Never calls production isQuietHour(). Production change undetected.
findings.evidence: Local computation, no NotificationService method call
findings.recommended_fix: Make isQuietHour() internal and test against production code

findings.title: Sync merge tests missing same-timestamp tie-breaking and nil modifiedAt
findings.description: Tests cover remote-newer, local-newer, no-local. Missing: same-timestamp tie, nil modifiedAt, nil remote field overwriting populated local.
findings.evidence: 4 daily log + 3 weekly snapshot tests, no tie or nil cases
findings.recommended_fix: Add tie-breaking, nil-timestamp, and nil-field-overwrite tests

findings.title: No offline/no-network tests for any sync or auth service
findings.description: Entire suite has no offline scenario tests. No URLProtocol subclass or network stub exists.
findings.evidence: No network mocking infrastructure in test suite
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce URLProtocol-based network stub. Add offline sync queuing, auth error, reconnect retry tests

findings.title: Import tests missing malformed CSV edge cases and performance test
findings.description: 15 tests cover happy-path CSV/JSON. Missing: missing required columns, non-numeric values, unknown JSON fields, large input performance.
findings.evidence: All CSV tests use well-formed 2-row inputs
findings.recommended_fix: Add malformed CSV, non-numeric, unknown field, and measure() performance tests

findings.title: No XCUITest files — zero UI integration test coverage
findings.description: Only XCTestCase unit and eval tests. No XCUITest files. Critical user journeys untested in automation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add FitTrackerUITests: sign-in, onboarding, home readiness card, nutrition meal-log flow

findings.title: No snapshot tests for design system components
findings.description: No snapshot tests for 13 design system components. Token changes can visually break components undetected by CI.
findings.evidence: No SnapshotTesting imports or XCTSnapshot references
findings.recommended_fix: Integrate swift-snapshot-testing for AppCard, AppButton variants, light/dark mode

findings.title: No performance tests for ReadinessEngine or EncryptedDataStore
findings.description: ReadinessEngine.compute() called on every foreground with 90+ logs. EncryptedDataStore loads all on startup. No measure() tests.
findings.evidence: No self.measure {} or XCTPerformanceMetric in any test file
findings.recommended_fix: Add performance tests: ReadinessEngine with 90 logs (<50ms), EncryptedDataStore load/save (<100ms)

findings.title: No accessibility tests
findings.description: No tests for Dynamic Type, VoiceOver labels, or minimum tap targets. UX foundations mandates accessibility but no automated enforcement.
findings.evidence: No XCUIAccessibilityElement or UIAccessibility APIs in tests
findings.recommended_fix: Add accessibility tests: all interactive elements have labels, min 44x44pt, Dynamic Type XXL no clip

findings.title: AIOutputQualityEvals duplicates private humanReadableSignal from production UI
findings.description: Replicates switch statement from AIInsightCard. Comment acknowledges sync risk. If production changes, eval silently diverges.
findings.evidence: Private copy of production function, not a reference
findings.recommended_fix: Extract as internal static function, test calls production code directly

findings.title: makeLogs() uses Double.random — tests are non-deterministic
findings.description: Adds random offsets to HRV, restingHR, sleepHours. Could theoretically produce out-of-range results on unlucky seeds.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with deterministic offsets or fixed seed

findings.title: TrainingPlanView.swift is 2141 lines — largest file, HISTORICAL v1
findings.description: Largest Swift file in codebase. HISTORICAL v1, no longer in build target but inflates tooling and grep results.
findings.recommended_fix: Archive to _historical/ directory

findings.title: SettingsView.swift (v2) is 1170 lines — actively compiled, decomposition candidate
findings.description: 5 category groups, delete-account, export, sync controls all in one file. Too many responsibilities.
findings.recommended_fix: Extract each category destination to its own file; SettingsView becomes ~200-line router

findings.title: NutritionView.swift is 1112 lines — HISTORICAL v1
findings.description: HISTORICAL v1, same archival need as TrainingPlanView.
findings.recommended_fix: Archive to _historical/

findings.title: MealEntrySheet.swift is 1155 lines — actively compiled, 17 @State vars, 4 tabs
findings.description: Camera, photo picker, food search, label parsing all in one view. 17 @State properties indicate this needs a ViewModel.
findings.recommended_fix: Extract each tab into own view, create MealEntryViewModel

findings.title: SettingsView.swift (v1) is 1189 lines — HISTORICAL
findings.description: HISTORICAL v1. Should be archived.
findings.recommended_fix: Archive to _historical/

findings.title: MainScreenView (v2) is 660 lines with 12 @State — approaching threshold
findings.description: Above 500-line threshold. Milestone logic + 12 @State suggest ViewModel extraction needed.
findings.recommended_fix: Extract HomeViewModel for milestone detection and state management

findings.title: HISTORICAL MainScreenView has 11 raw .font(.system(size:)) calls
findings.description: v1 file with DS-exception comments documenting need for AppText.metricResponsive token variants.
findings.recommended_fix: If archived, no action. If token variants needed, add AppText.metricResponsive

findings.title: Raw font size in v2 onboarding welcome — .font(.system(size: 32))
findings.description: Token violation in actively compiled v2 file. Should use AppText.brandWordmark.
findings.recommended_fix: Add AppText.brandWordmark token and use it

findings.title: Raw font size in v2 onboarding — .font(.system(size: 36))
findings.description: Hardcoded size in compiled v2 file.
findings.recommended_fix: Use appropriate AppText token

findings.title: Raw font size for close button — .font(.system(size: 22))
findings.description: Hardcoded font size for icon.
findings.recommended_fix: Use AppText.iconMedium or appropriate token

findings.title: Hardcoded font + fixed width — .font(.system(size: 40)) + .frame(width: 300)
findings.description: Fixed width breaks Dynamic Type. Hardcoded font size.
findings.recommended_fix: Use token + responsive layout (maxWidth instead of fixed width)

findings.title: Deprecated .foregroundColor(.white) — raw color + deprecated API
findings.description: Uses deprecated SwiftUI API and raw color literal.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with .foregroundStyle(AppColor.Text.inversePrimary)

findings.title: Two raw .font(.system(size:)) in empty-state branches
findings.description: Hardcoded sizes in empty state views.
findings.recommended_fix: Use AppText tokens

findings.title: AppSelectionCard and AppInputShell use raw shadow literals — tokens exist but unused
findings.description: radius: 10, y: 4 raw literals when AppShadow.cardRadius / AppShadow.cardYOffset tokens already exist.
findings.evidence: Raw shadow values alongside existing tokens
findings.recommended_fix: Use AppShadow tokens

findings.title: ImportSourcePickerView + ImportPreviewView are dead views — unreferenced
findings.description: Both files exist but are never wired into any navigation path.
findings.evidence: No references found outside the files themselves
findings.recommended_fix: Remove or wire into import feature nav

findings.title: NotificationPermissionPrimingView is dead — never shown
findings.description: Smart-reminders shipped T1-T4 but this priming screen is unreferenced.
findings.recommended_fix: Wire into notification permission flow or remove

findings.title: 17 @State properties + async logic in view — needs ViewModel extraction
findings.description: Network/parse async logic mixed with view state. Violates separation of concerns.
findings.evidence: 17 @State vars, async network calls in view body
findings.recommended_fix: Extract MealEntryViewModel

findings.title: Milestone detection business state as @State in view layer
findings.description: shownMilestoneStreak, shownMilestonePhase, milestoneTitle, milestoneMessage — business logic as view state.
findings.recommended_fix: Move to HomeViewModel

findings.title: Thumbs-up/down buttons missing accessibilityLabel — VoiceOver reads raw SF Symbol names
findings.description: Interactive feedback buttons have no accessibility labels.
findings.recommended_fix: Add .accessibilityLabel("Helpful") and .accessibilityLabel("Not helpful")

findings.title: 'Maybe later' dismiss button missing accessibilityHint
findings.description: Dismiss button has no hint explaining what it does.
findings.recommended_fix: Add .accessibilityHint("Dismisses the upgrade prompt")

findings.title: Raw .font(.system(size: 56)) for bell icon
findings.description: Hardcoded size for illustration icon in dead view.
findings.recommended_fix: Use token if view is kept; remove with view if dead

findings.title: Raw .font(.system(size: 28)) for AI sheet button icon
findings.description: Minor hardcoded size in tab bar.
findings.recommended_fix: Use AppText.iconLarge token

findings.title: 'Choose File' card is a silent no-op — no disabled state or feedback
findings.description: Tap does nothing, no visual indication it's not functional.
findings.recommended_fix: Add .disabled(true) with visual state, or implement functionality

findings.title: RecommendationOutcome built and immediately discarded — dead code
findings.description: _ = outcome — outcome is constructed but unused until DI is wired.
findings.recommended_fix: Wire to RecommendationMemory or remove dead construction

findings.title: 8 v1 Onboarding HISTORICAL files co-exist with v2 counterparts
findings.description: Consistent with v2 rule; batch archival deferred per backlog.
findings.evidence: 8 files without v2/ prefix alongside v2/ versions
findings.recommended_fix: Batch archival when convenient — not blocking
